asserted.BALANCE_usage_in_bundle: Used as payment_type for Manual transaction type entries
asserted.note: No read-only endpoint exists to directly list all payment_types_tbl entries. ACCOUNT is completely absent from the frontend JS bundle (index-B0E7Y5i9.js). BALANCE is present in the bundle hardcoded for manual entries. Existing SO transactions use CREDIT_CARD (id=1) and CASH (id=3). ACCOUNT and BALANCE do not appear in any existing SO transaction records across bookings 7-11.
